deduplication-logic-checker.evidence: Three-layer dedup verified: (1) fingerprint column added to market_signals with UNIQUE index market_signals_fingerprint_idx (partial, WHERE fingerprint IS NOT NULL). (2) Non-partial unique index market_signals_source_external_uniq added on (source_type, external_id) — replaces broken partial index that blocked ON CONFLICT resolution. (3) rss-to-signals now populates fingerprint = btoa(encodeURIComponent(title|source|published_at)).slice(0,64). (4) Dedup test: second rss-to-signals run against same 20 items returned total_signals=30 (unchanged) — no new rows inserted.

db_state.market_signals_fingerprint_idx: UNIQUE partial index (fingerprint IS NOT NULL)

dedup_strategy.rss_to_signals: ON CONFLICT (source_type, external_id) DO UPDATE — upserts existing rows, no duplicates inserted
dedup_strategy.feed_orchestrator: ON CONFLICT (source_type, external_id) DO UPDATE with source_feed_id and is_duplicate=false
